template.template: Template Vertiv ENP ENV SIC SNMP
template.name: Template Vertiv ENP ENV SIC SNMP
template.description: Generated from ENP_ENV_SIC[SENSOR]-MIB.mib for Zabbix 5.0 XML import. Root OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.2.503 Scalar objects use numeric OIDs so Zabbix does not need these MIB files installed. SNMP trap items are disabled by default; enable them only after SNMP trap collection is configured.

item.name: identManufacturer
item.description: The name of the device manufacturer. MIB object: identManufacturer Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.2.503.1.1.0

item.name: identModel
item.description: The manufacturers model designation of the device. MIB object: identModel Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.2.503.1.2.0

item.name: identIndex
item.description: The sequence number of the device. MIB object: identIndex Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.2.503.1.3.0 MIB MAX-ACCESS is read-write; this template only polls it with SNMP GET.

item.name: sensor0 (group2.1)
item.description: sensor0, status. MIB object: sensor0 Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.2.503.2.2.1.0

item.name: temp0
item.description: temp0, stored as 0.1degC. MIB object: temp0 Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.2.503.2.2.2.0

item.name: hum0
item.description: hum0, stored as 0.1%. MIB object: hum0 Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.2.503.2.2.3.0

item.name: temp0alarmstatus
item.description: temp0alarmstatus, status. MIB object: temp0alarmstatus Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.2.503.2.2.4.0

item.description: hum0alarmstatus, status. MIB object: hum0alarmstatus Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.2.503.2.2.5.0

item.name: smoke1criterion
item.description: smoke1criterion, status. MIB object: smoke1criterion Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.2.503.2.4.24.0 MIB MAX-ACCESS is read-write; this template only polls it with SNMP GET.

item.name: SNMP trap: systemAlarmTrapFormatDefine
item.description: An alarm trap is sent when an alarm occurs (activated) or returns to normal state (deactivated). Alarm traps are logged in alarmTrapTable. Variables in this trap: * systemAlarmIndex - The unique sequence number of this alarm trap. * systemAlarmTime - Date and time when event occured (local time). * systemAlarmStatusChange - (0) activated or (1) deactivated. * systemAlarmSeverity - The severity of the alarm.. * systemAlarmId - Alarm id. * systemAlarmEquipId - Alarm equipment id. * systemAlarmEquipTypeId - Alarm equipment type id. Notification OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.2.503.4.1

template.name: Template Vertiv ENP RDU SNMP
template.description: Generated from ENP_RDU[DUMMY]-MIB.mib for Zabbix 5.0 XML import. Root OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.1.100 Scalar objects use numeric OIDs so Zabbix does not need these MIB files installed. SNMP trap items are disabled by default; enable them only after SNMP trap collection is configured.

item.name: identManufacturer
item.description: The name of the device manufacturer. MIB object: identManufacturer Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.1.100.1.1.0

item.name: identModel
item.description: The manufacturers model designation of the device. MIB object: identModel Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.1.100.1.2.0

item.name: identIndex
item.description: The sequence number of the device. MIB object: identIndex Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.1.100.1.3.0 MIB MAX-ACCESS is read-write; this template only polls it with SNMP GET.

item.name: systemstatus
item.description: systemstatus, status. MIB object: systemstatus Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.1.100.2.2.1.0

item.name: runningconfigtype
item.description: runningconfigtype, status. MIB object: runningconfigtype Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.1.100.2.2.3.0

item.name: automanstate
item.description: automanstate, status. MIB object: automanstate Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.1.100.2.3.4.0 MIB MAX-ACCESS is read-write; this template only polls it with SNMP GET.

item.name: outgoingalarmblocked
item.description: outgoingalarmblocked, status. MIB object: outgoingalarmblocked Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.1.100.2.3.5.0 MIB MAX-ACCESS is read-write; this template only polls it with SNMP GET.

item.name: datastatstartoclock
item.description: datastatstartoclock, stored as 1oclock. MIB object: datastatstartoclock Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.1.100.2.3.6.0 MIB MAX-ACCESS is read-write; this template only polls it with SNMP GET.

item.name: datastatperiod
item.description: datastatperiod, stored as 1h. MIB object: datastatperiod Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.1.100.2.3.7.0 MIB MAX-ACCESS is read-write; this template only polls it with SNMP GET.

item.name: SNMP trap: systemAlarmTrapFormatDefine
item.description: An alarm trap is sent when an alarm occurs (activated) or returns to normal state (deactivated). Alarm traps are logged in alarmTrapTable. Variables in this trap: * systemAlarmIndex - The unique sequence number of this alarm trap. * systemAlarmTime - Date and time when event occured (local time). * systemAlarmStatusChange - (0) activated or (1) deactivated. * systemAlarmSeverity - The severity of the alarm.. * systemAlarmId - Alarm id. * systemAlarmEquipId - Alarm equipment id. * systemAlarmEquipTypeId - Alarm equipment type id. Notification OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.1.100.4.1

item.name: lognumberset
item.description: lognumberset, stored as 1. MIB object: lognumberset Numeric OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.2.4067.2.2.180.0 MIB MAX-ACCESS is read-write; this template only polls it with SNMP GET.

item.name: SNMP trap: systemAlarmTrapFormatDefine
item.description: An alarm trap is sent when an alarm occurs (activated) or returns to normal state (deactivated). Alarm traps are logged in alarmTrapTable. Variables in this trap: * systemAlarmIndex - The unique sequence number of this alarm trap. * systemAlarmTime - Date and time when event occured (local time). * systemAlarmStatusChange - (0) activated or (1) deactivated. * systemAlarmSeverity - The severity of the alarm.. * systemAlarmId - Alarm id. * systemAlarmEquipId - Alarm equipment id. * systemAlarmEquipTypeId - Alarm equipment type id. Notification OID: .1.3.6.1.4.1.13400.2.4067.4.1
